item.title: New York Knicks stage epic comeback to take Game 1 of NBA Finals
item.description: The visitors trailed by 14 points at one stage in the second half.

item.title: ‘Lives within its means’: SA Budget hands families relief while hospital construction costs blowout looms
item.description: Who are the winners and losers as Labor delivers a ‘conservative’ financial plan.

item.title: Scientists bake sourdough using 5300-year-old yeast from ancient mummy Otzi the Iceman
item.description: Researchers have their eye on a popular beverage for their next experiment.

item.title: Mike Smithson: The ‘no surprises’ South Australian budget that surprised no one
item.description: Budget papers revealed surpluses were up and debt is exploding.

item.title: Employees injured after plane’s nose gear collapses at Frankfurt airport
item.description: Footage circulating online captured the shocking moment the front supports of a Lufthansa plane unexpectedly gave way.

item.title: Polish qualifier Maja Chwalinska to face Mirra Andreeva in French Open final
item.description: The 24-year-old was in a playful mood after making the final, poking fun at a reporter and spilling on her own team.

item.title: Australia fall apart in ODI decider against Pakistan
item.description: It was a dire day from the Australians and it ended up costing them the series.

item.title: England bowler Ollie Robinson wastes New Zealand on first day of Lord’s Test
item.description: ‘I still can’t really put it into words.’

item.title: Aussie No.1 Maya Joint’s difficult retirement admission amid six-month losing streak
item.description: The 20-year-old has owned up to ‘a momentary lack of judgement’ after losing to a player ranked 243 places below her.

item.title: Former prince Andrew spotted with large bruise on his cheek
item.description: The disgraced royal has been under intense scrutiny since his February arrest.

item.title: Toyota and Lexus recall thousands of vehicles over software error
item.description: The defect ‘may increase the risk of an accident causing injury or death’.

item.title: Residents attack Ebola burial team in DRC as cases and deaths continue to rise
item.description: This assault marks the second attack in a week on local health workers in the region.

item.title: Fresh footage shows scale of destruction after deadly Iranian attack on Kuwait airport
item.description: The Middle East attack killed one and injured dozens more.

item.title: Princess Catherine shares emotional moment with cancer patient: ‘Isn’t mummy brave?’
item.description: The royal drew from her own diagnosis to comfort the young mother.

item.title: The Rock called out for latest beauty ad: ‘He’s bald’
item.description: The pro-wrestler turned actor responded to the comments with his own hilarious video.

item.title: Top Gun: Maverick actor James Handy dead, girlfriend’s son arrested in Los Angeles
item.description: A man called police to report he had killed a ‘man of sin’.

item.title: Home And Away star Adam Rowland shares major family update
item.description: The news follows the actor’s engagement to Olivia Lewis in January.

item.title: Perth father identified as man killed in Wanneroo bus crash
item.description: The man was a bus passenger on what ‘should have been an ordinary commute to work’.

item.title: Socceroos legend Mark Bosnich sent to hospital after World Cup launch event gone wrong
item.description: Those watching on thought the TV star was pulling a stunt before realising it was no joke.

item.title: Gold Coast pensioner Carole Curtis faces losing home as alleged Christopher Bruce Smith fraud investigation stalls
item.description: The 83-year-old says she is still waiting for answers nearly a year after alerting police.

item.title: Norway's crown princess Mette-Marit on list for lung transplant
item.description: Her life-threatening lung disease has worsened, the royal household says.

item.title: Aussie parents ditch smartphones for kids, revive the classic landline
item.description: ‘It’s like stepping back through time.’

item.title: Child predator jailed in Tasmania for using social media to trick minors into sending sexual content
item.description: The 34-year-old offered money, vapes and a PlayStation to obtain hundreds of horrific videos.

item.title: Anthony Head, star of Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Ted Lasso, dies just months after his wife’s death
item.description: His daughters have since spoken out about their ‘extraordinary father’.

item.title: Australian racing driver Joey Mawson cleared of raping Michael Schumacher nurse
item.description: The nurse has issued a statement after a court cleared Joey Mawson of all charges.

item.title: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic urges AI pause due to rapid advances in the technology
item.description: The team behind Claude say the rapid advances in artificial intelligence could soon break free of needing humans.

item.title: Melbourne’s possible nickname for new BBL team send fans into meltdown
item.description: ‘Why are they complicating it?’

item.title: Australian nurse reveals why she dipped into her superannuation to pay for weight-loss surgery
item.description: The 69-year-old was left with chronic pain after spending a lifetime on her feet helping patients. Then a conversation with a colleague gave her the solution.

item.title: Australian Football Hall of Fame needs urgent audit as names from the past keep rolling in
item.description: The problem is abundantly obvious and something has to urgently change.

item.title: Norwegian crown princess to continue University of Sydney studies at home due to mother’s failing health
item.description: The Norwegian royal made a frantic dash home after her mother’s health deteriorated.

item.title: Socceroos star Connor Metcalfe hits out at USA pundits ahead of World Cup: ‘So much rubbish’
item.description: The gun midfielder is sick of the talk coming from the World Cup hosts.

item.title: Man dies after shark attack off coast of Albany, Western Australia
item.description: The 35-year-old was swimming off the coast of the Australian nature reserve when he was viciously mauled.

item.title: Celebrity couple Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding venue revealed
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly set to wed over the July 4 holiday weekend.

item.title: Fireball Miss storms home to claim threeling Queensland Oaks
item.description: The three-year-old became the fourth horse in past 25 years to claim a rare double.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Liberal MP Phil Thompson stared death in the face. Now he’s ramping up his political fight for veterans
item.description: ‘It spits in the face of every soldier, sailor and aviator in the country.’

item.title: Melbourne teacher's brother charged with murder after Sunil Sharma’s disappearance in India
item.description: ‘Anyone who’s met my dad will say he is intelligent, strong and funny, but he is also loving and sensitive.’

item.title: Billionaire entrepreneur Adrian Portelli to bring discount petrol scheme to South Australia
item.description: One state’s fuel market is set for a major shake-up.

item.title: Aussie Andrew Moloney secures world title two years after quitting boxing
item.description: The 35-year-old knocked back $350,000 before completing a fairytale comeback.

item.title: Farmers plead for help with ‘unbelievable’ numbers of rising feral pig populations
item.description: ‘These pests breed rapidly, spread disease and cause untold devastation to agriculture and the environment.’

item.title: Mirra Andreeva channels Maria Sharapova after claiming first grand slam title with French Open win
item.description: The celebration looked familiar to many and tennis’s newest champion hoped her idol was watching.

item.title: Socceroos coach Tony Popovic ‘just happy’ after young side’s draw with world No.19 Switzerland
item.description: A young gun put on a show and the final pieces of the puzzle came together seven days before Australia’s World Cup opener.

item.title: Why the Maldives is more than just a honeymoon destination
item.description: It’s never been easier to get to the idyllic location, and there is so much to do when you get there.

item.title: Is motor neurone disease becoming more common? Researchers reveal why awareness has never been so important
item.description: The disease was thrust back into the spotlight with the death of FightMND co-founder Neale Daniher and the diagnosis of NRL star Jai Arrow.

item.title: Family devastated after Daniel Turpin killed in shark attack off coast of Albany, Western Australia
item.description: ‘Daniel was an adored husband, son, brother and uncle who had a lifelong love and deep respect for the ocean.’

item.description: ‘Deeply saddened’ race officials have released a statement after the King’s Birthday tragedy.

item.description: The worker was confronting four teens over alleged shoplifting at the time.

item.title: Australia's fertility rate plummets to historic low amid cost of living crisis
item.description: Experts are calling it a human catastrophe that could trigger an economic shock for generations to come.

item.title: Police hunt owner after four-year-old girl undergoes plastic surgery following dog attack in Claremont Meadows, western Sydney
item.description: The four-year-old had plastic surgery on Sunday.

item.title: Newspoll: Pauline Hanson and One Nation overtake Anthony Albanese’s Labor for first time in history
item.description: The result comes amid speculation the veteran party leader could make a tilt at the House of Representatives.

item.title: Men should be at brunch too: The grassroots organisation helping cure male loneliness
item.description: ‘Women are much better at building up social networks ... whereas men are pretty hopeless at that.’

item.description: Delays, lost parcels and ‘attempted deliveries’ continue to tick off everyday Aussies.

item.title: Immigration picking up the slack as Australia’s fertility rate sinks to all-time low
item.description: It’s a political football. It’s also the only thing saving us from economic oblivion.

item.title: King’s Birthday Honours 2026: Former Tasmanian premier Will Hodgman, ex-senator Natasha Stott Despoja, centenarian Florence Drury among those recognised
item.description: More than seven decades separate the youngest and oldest recipients for 2026.

item.title: Donald Trump storms out of NBC interview after heated exchange with reporter
item.description: ‘You’re either crooked or you’re stupid’: Watch the moment the US President abruptly ended an interview with a veteran journalist and stormed off set.

item.title: Alexander Zverev bins unwanted honour with French Open triumph over Flavio Cobolli
item.description: The perennial runner-up refused to blow another golden chance but it took more than four hours to end his hoodoo.

item.title: Denmark star Christian Eriksen ‘doing well’ after collapsing during match against Ukraine
item.description: Players were in tears after the veteran, who died for five minutes in a game four years ago, clutched his chest and fell to the ground.

item.title: Protest move after F1 veteran Pierre Gasly ‘heartbroken’ stripped of Monaco podium
item.description: Australia’s Oscar Piastri was thanking his lucky stars as his ‘robbed’ rival declared ‘what’s going on is not right’.

item.description: The scientist and former Australian of the Year died age 59 after battling stage four brain cancer.

item.description: Donald Trump has sent a message to Iran following the retaliatory strikes.

item.description: A pilot and copilot are believed to have been the sole occupants.

item.description: The fan favourite won titles in Chicago’s Michael Jordan era and went on to become ‘one of the most beloved figures’ in the city.

item.description: The 7.8 magnitude quake shook the region early Monday morning and triggered a now-cancelled tsunami warning.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Death toll rises to 35 after massive earthquake in southern Philippines
item.description: The tremor registered at a magnitude of 7.8 and prompted a number of now-cancelled tsunami warnings in the region.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Murder charge laid in Melbourne homicide probe after man killed outside pub
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: England captain Ben Stokes and fast bowler Gus Atkinson face axe after nightclub incident
item.description: Ben Stokes is under investigation for a serious ‘breach’ in the early hours of Monday morning.

item.title: Ford Fiesta ST to return as an electric hot hatch
item.description: The next-generation Ford Fiesta might be a Renault 5 E-Tech under the skin, but it will have 'rally-bred' styling and an ST variant.

item.title: Subaru WRX Sportwagon gains hybrid option in Japan
item.description: The Subaru Levorg, known locally as the WRX Sportswagon, has gained a new hybrid drivetrain in Japan with revised styling and a different character.

item.title: Former NRL enforcer Kane Evans comes out: ‘I know that I’m gay
item.description: Kane Evans has revealed a 20-year ‘war’ with his own sexuality that almost took his life.

item.title: Private jet that crashed in Dominican Republic was en route to pick up ex-MLB star
item.description: Local officials confirmed the pilot and co-pilot were killed in the horror crash landing.

item.title: Blues drop Haumole Olakau’atu for State of Origin as Stephen Crichton out with shoulder injury
item.description: NSW coach Laurie Daley is putting his faith in a debutant for game two next week.

item.title: Alastair Clarkson under fresh scrutiny as ‘alarming’ vision of ‘catastrophic’ defending against Fremantle emerges
item.description: ‘If this is the way that you want to defend then this is absolutely catastrophic.’
